chunks.title: Jehoshaphat's Early Reign and Spiritual Reform
chunks.reason: Describes Jehoshaphat's succession, military preparations, and initial spiritual reforms driven by Yahweh's favor.

chunks.title: The Teaching Mission
chunks.reason: Details the sending of officials and Levites to teach the law throughout Judah in the third year of his reign.

chunks.title: Divine Peace and Growing Wealth
chunks.reason: Narrates the fear of surrounding nations, tribute received from Philistines and Arabians, and Jehoshaphat's increasing prosperity.

chunks.title: Military Muster of Judah and Benjamin
chunks.reason: Provides a detailed catalog of commanders and the number of mighty men in Jerusalem and fortified cities.
